title: Managing Azure NetApp Files
summary: Build your knowledge and skills in managing Azure NetApp Files. Start with fundamental setup tasks and registration steps needed to deploy and manage Azure NetApp Files resources.

sections.title: Managing Azure NetApp Files
sections.summary: Build your knowledge and skills in managing Azure NetApp Files. Start with fundamental setup tasks and registration steps needed to deploy and manage Azure NetApp Files resources.

lessons.title: Register and Set Up Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn to register and set up Azure NetApp Files by registering the NetApp Resource Provider and create a NetApp account. Also learn how to delegate a subnet to Azure NetApp Files and request access to a region

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/managing-azure-netapp-files-register-setup/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Register and Set Up Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Manage Active Directory for Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and manage Active Directory connections for Azure NetApp Files. Also, learn how to modify Active Directory connections and configure AD DS LDAP over TLS for Azure NetApp Files. Finally, you learn to join a Linux VM to a Microsoft Entra Domain to enable users to sign into to VMs with one set of credentials.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/managing-azure-netapp-files-manage-active-directory/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Active Directory for Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Manage capacity pool for Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create a capacity pool, which enables you to create volumes. Learn ways to manage a QoS capacity pool by setting it up and monitoring throughput. Use tags to help you manage Azure NetApp Files billing and expenses.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-capacity-pool-azure-netapp-files/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage capacity pool for Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Manage NFS volumes in Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and manage NFS volumes. Learn to configure NFSv4.1 ID domain and Kerberos, enable Active Directory Domain Services and LDAP authentication for NFS volumes. Also, understand how to convert NFS volumes between supported versions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-nfs-volumes-azure-netapp-files/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage NFS volumes in Azure NetApp Files

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Managing Azure NetApp Files
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Managing Azure NetApp Files**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
